title: MySQL integrated CDC pipeline is now in Beta ​
body:
**July 1, 2026**

The integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). An integrated CDC pipeline ingests change data from MySQL into Databricks using a single pipeline, combining extraction and application into one pipeline update. Unlike the standard gateway-based architecture, an integrated CDC pipeline requires no separate ingestion gateway. See [Create an integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/mysql-integrated-pipeline).
